---
title: "500,000 Lives Lost"
description: "To all the lives and dreams lost."
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-02-22"
categories: [society, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![500,000 lives lost. Image from [Reuters](https://graphics.reuters.com/HEALTH-CORONAVIRUS/USA-CASUALTIES-CHRONOLOGY/xklpyomnrpg/index.html).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

To all the lives and dreams lost.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_500000-lives-lost-activity-6769876584846520320-KGy2).*
